headline: Ameriprise Financial (AMP): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Since December 2025, Ameriprise Financial has been in a holding pattern, posting a small loss of 4.7% while floating around $454.49. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 10.7% gain during that period.
